get.summary: This API method retrieves the current status of an "Export to File" job for a specified report. If the job status is "Succeeded," it returns a temporary file URL. You can use this URL to download the exported data. Please note that the file link is valid for up to seven days.

accept or decline

Job Allocated = 0
Job Completed = 1
Job Invoiced = 2
Job Cancelled = 3
Engineer Travelling = 4
Engineer Arrived = 5
Invoice Payment = 8

Tags.description: A list of tags, associated to the Asset that can be used for searching/filtering

The type of entity that owns the Contact
Entity Types: 
Customer = 1, 
Site = 2, 
Job = 3

PurchaseOrderId.description: Id of the Purchase Order in Joblogic. It's required when adding lines individually

TaxRate.description:
Tax Rate for the line item. The value of this must match an existing tax code value in Joblogic 
other wise it will be reset to no tax

PartId.description: Id of the Part in Joblogic which can be linked to this line

Discount.description: Discount for the Purchase Order Line Item in percentages (%)

SupplierId.description: Id of the Supplier in Joblogic that will own the purchase order

JobId.description: Id of the Job in Joblogic, It's required if Purchase Order Type is Job

DeliveryAddressType.description:
Must match an existing Purchase Order Address Type Option, not case sensitive
1: Job
2: Storeroom
3: Engineer
4: SupplierBranch
5: Other
6: Location

DeliveryName.description: Name of the delivery . It's required if the Delivery Address Type is Other, Location or Engineer

SupplierBranchId.description:
Id of the Supplier Branch that purchase order will be delivered to.
It's required if the Delivery Address Type is Supplier Branch

Tags.description: A list of tags, associated to the Purchase order that can be used for searching/filtering

FileName.description: Full file name including the file extention. Only the following are allowed png, jpeg, tif, bmp, doc, docx, pdf

TaxRate.description:
Tax Rate for supplier invoice amount. The value of this must match an existing tax code value in Joblogic 
other wise it will be reset to no tax

Amount.description: Amount for the Suppleir Invoice Amount

Discount.description: Discount for the Suppleir Invoice in percentages (%)

NominalCode.description: Nominal Code for the Supplier Invoice

Lines.description:
If no invoice lines are entered, then the TaxRate, Amount, Discount and NominalCode above will be used to create a line.
If invoice lines are entered, then the TaxRate, Amount, Discount and NominalCode above will be ignored.

Default if not specified is no Tax Rate
